input.user_input: Add a choice of law clause to this services agreement. It currently has none. Use Delaware law.

actual:
Please upload the services agreement you would like me to modify. Once you provide the document, I can add the Delaware choice of law clause to the appropriate section. 

In the meantime, a standard Delaware choice of law clause typically reads as follows:

**Governing Law.** This Agreement, and all claims or causes of action (whether in contract, tort, or statute) that may be based upon, arise out of, or relate to this Agreement, or the negotiation, execution, or performance of this Agreement, shall be governed by, and enforced in accordance with, the internal laws of the State of Delaware, including its statutes of limitations, without reference to its choice of law rules.
